message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "User Agent" as UA

box "Wallet"
participant "Frontend" as WF
participant "Backend" as WB
end box

box "Issuer"
participant "Metadata" as IM
participant "Web Site" as IW
participant "Token Endpoint" as ITE
participant "Credential Endpoint" as ICE
end box

UA -> ICE : get credential

hnote over UA, ICE #FFFFE0
prepare credential issuance
end note

UA <-- ICE : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

UA -> WF : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

WF -> WF : gen DPoP key

WF -> WF : gen DPoP proof for issuer token endpoint

WF -> WB : get nonce (for app attestation)

WF <-- WB : nonce

WF -> WF : obtain app attestation (nonce)

WF -> WB : get assertion for code exchange\n(hash(pre-authz-code), app attestation)

WB -> WB : check app_attestation

WB -> WB : generate assertion\n(iss=wallet backend, pre_authz_code_hash, client_id)

WF <-- WB : assertion

WF -> IM : get issuer metadata

WF -> ITE : token request\n(pre-authz-code, pin, client_id, assertion, dpop_proof)

hnote over WF, ITE #FFFFE0
wallet authenticates with issuer as OAuth Client using the assertion issued by its backend (RFC 7523)
issuer checks wallet backend id and key against trust registry
end note

hnote over WF, ITE #FFFFE0
Token Endpoint validates pre-authorized code and creates corresponding access token
end note

WF <-- ITE : token response\n(access_token, c_nonce)

WF -> WF : gen key : key, key_attestation

WF -> WF : create proof of posssion (c_nonce)

WF -> WF : create DPoP proof for issuance request

WF -> ICE : issue credential\n(access_token, credential_type, format, proof, key_policy, dpop_proof)

hnote over WF, ICE #FFFFE0
Credential Endpoint Token checks whether the access token is good for requested credential type and
whether the proof of possession is valid
end note

WF <-- ICE : credential response (credential, format)

@enduml
```
